result.stdout:
DeepClean - Recursively delete bin and obj folders
==================================================

Usage: deepclean [options]

Options:
  -d, --dry-run    Show what would be deleted without actually deleting
  -y, --yes        Skip confirmation prompt and delete automatically
  -h, --help       Show this help message

Description:
  Recursively finds and deletes all 'bin' and 'obj' folders from the
  current directory downwards. Useful for cleaning up .NET projects.
